description: A developer-first Flutter package that wraps ListView.builder for real-world lists: async pagination, pull-to-refresh, and sync-or-async search.
rules: list_smith wraps ListView.builder to add async pagination, pull-to-refresh, and sync-or-async search. Concrete usage rules (the widget API, the data-source and search/cache policy) will be added here once the public API is finalised.
